title: Release candidate, version, installer, and upgrade audit

acceptance_criteria.text: Cut a release-candidate checklist for the next desktop release, including version source of truth, changelog cut, tag plan, installer artifact, checksum artifact, and rollback note.
Resolve the current stable/latest-release documentation mismatch so README, CHANGELOG, package version, Tauri version, VERSION, and release artifacts tell one consistent story.
Verify installer upgrade behavior from the old Apex A+ naming line and current SkillForge line, documenting whether installs replace, coexist, or migrate.
Run a Windows release smoke test: install, launch, switch tracks, answer content, create backup, close/reopen, uninstall/reinstall or upgrade, and confirm learner data behavior.
Record a release audit with commands, installer paths, checksum evidence, signing status, SmartScreen expectation, and residual risks.

source: Gap review: release/version cleanup and upgrade/install behavior audit
